pillar_careers: Employer evenings, alumni networks, CV workshops, and internship pipelines - your career era starts here.
hero_intro: Bath Economics Society is your shortcut to the people, opportunities, and ideas that actually move your career forward. 770+ members. Weekly drops. Real connections.
section_copy: BEST is where ambition meets community. Every week we show up with content and events that turn your economics degree into a career advantage — before you've even graduated.
pillar_community: Socials, collabs, and a committee that actually cares. Good people studying the same thing you are.
panel_1: Events, deadlines, and society updates — all in one place, always up to date.
panel_2: The economics stories worth knowing, curated weekly by students who actually read the news.
panel_3: Industry partners bringing real opportunities directly to BES members.
pillar_academic: Guest speakers, debates, and reading groups that go beyond the lecture slides. Stay curious, stay ahead.
section_title: More than a degree. A head start.
